_comment: ClawFilters Agent Autonomy SLA — expressed in the AgentSLA DSL proposed by Jouneaux & Cabot (arXiv:2511.02885). This document formalizes the governance commitments ClawFilters makes about its own behavior as an enforcement layer. See AGENT_AUTONOMY_SLA.md for the full specification narrative.
_license_note: The AgentSLA DSL structure, metric type vocabulary (OversightLevel, MCP, TTFT, etc.), and field names used in this document are the work of Gwendal Jouneaux and Jordi Cabot. Their repository carries no explicit LICENSE file at time of this writing. This document conforms to their schema format but does not copy their source code. We have cited their work in full. If you are the author and would like a license added, please open an issue at https://github.com/QuietFireAI/ClawFilters.

QoSMetric.name: InterceptCoverage
QoSMetric.description: Fraction of MCP tool calls intercepted by the governance layer before execution. Must be 1.0 — no bypass path exists.

QoSMetric.name: GovernanceDecisionLatency
QoSMetric.description: Time from tool call intercept to ALLOW / GATE / BLOCK decision. The decision precedes forwarding — no deferred evaluation.

QoSMetric.name: AuditChainCompleteness
QoSMetric.description: Fraction of governance decisions appended to the cryptographic audit chain within the same transaction as the decision. No decision without a record.

QoSMetric.name: MCPProtocolCompliance
QoSMetric.description: MCP protocol compliance of the governance layer itself (1 = fully compliant, 0 = not). All 13 registered tools conform to the Model Context Protocol specification.

QoSMetric.name: OversightLevel_QUARANTINE
QoSMetric.description: Human oversight level for QUARANTINE-tier agents. 1.0 = full human oversight. All calls blocked by default; any allowlist exception requires explicit human approval. No autonomous execution.

QoSMetric.name: OversightLevel_PROBATION
QoSMetric.description: Human oversight level for PROBATION-tier agents. 0.75 = high oversight. Allowlisted calls proceed autonomously; all out-of-allowlist calls are gated pending human approval.

QoSMetric.name: OversightLevel_RESIDENT
QoSMetric.description: Human oversight level for RESIDENT-tier agents. 0.50 = moderate oversight. Standard-category calls proceed autonomously; privileged-category calls are gated pending human approval.

QoSMetric.name: OversightLevel_CITIZEN
QoSMetric.description: Human oversight level for CITIZEN-tier agents. 0.25 = low oversight. Most calls proceed autonomously; exceptional categories are gated. Manners Engine evaluated continuously.

QoSMetric.name: OversightLevel_AGENT
QoSMetric.description: Human oversight level for AGENT-tier (apex) agents. 0.10 = minimal oversight. All in-scope calls proceed autonomously. Anomaly detection events above threshold trigger mandatory HITL gate before the triggering call completes.

QoSMetric.name: MannersScore
QoSMetric.description: Continuous behavioral compliance score in [0.0, 1.0] produced by the 8-factor Manners Engine. Evaluated on every tool call — not batched. Drives automatic tier demotion when score falls below configured threshold (default 0.50).

QoSMetric.name: DataResidency
QoSMetric.description: Fraction of agent governance data processed entirely on-network. Must be 1.0 — zero agent data transmitted off-network. Self-hosted deployment guarantee.

DerivedQoSMetric.name: MannersScore_Window
DerivedQoSMetric.description: Rolling average Manners Engine score over a 100-message observation window. Used for promotion evaluation: sustained COMPLIANT band (>=0.75) required for PROBATION -> RESIDENT -> CITIZEN; sustained EXEMPLARY band (>=0.90) required for CITIZEN -> AGENT.

GuaranteeTerm._comment: Universal commitments — apply to every tool call, every tier, every agent.
QUARANTINE tier — maximum oversight. All calls blocked or gated. No autonomous execution.
PROBATION tier — high oversight. Allowlist-only autonomous execution; all other calls gated.
RESIDENT tier — moderate oversight. Standard calls autonomous; privileged calls gated.
CITIZEN tier — low oversight. Most calls autonomous; exceptional categories gated.
AGENT (apex) tier — minimal oversight. All in-scope calls autonomous. Anomaly detection triggers mandatory gate.
Auto-demotion guarantee — any agent whose Manners score falls below the configured threshold (default 0.50) is automatically demoted to QUARANTINE. Evaluated on every call.
Promotion gate — CITIZEN -> AGENT requires sustained EXEMPLARY band over rolling window. Evaluated against DerivedQoSMetric (rolling average).

QualifyingCondition.name: Sustained EXEMPLARY band over observation window

SLO.name: Promotion to AGENT tier eligible — operator confirmation required
